meta.title: What did NORAD's commander REALLY say about aliens?
meta.description:
NORAD's commander, Gen. Glenn VanHerck was recently asked by NYTimes Reporter Helene Cooper if he could rule out aliens as an explanation for the unusual objects shot down over North America last weekend. 

Here's how the general responded, versus how it was depicted in the media. Do you think he was inferring they could be aliens? Or do you think he was just politely leaving conclusions up to the intel community? 

#shorts #uap #ufo #balloon #balloons #f22 #f16 #military #norad #defense
